name: @adeze/raindrop-mcp
description: MCP Server for Raindrop.io bookmark management
long_description: This Model Context Protocol server provides comprehensive access to Raindrop.io bookmarking service. Features include: modular tool architecture, AI organization via sampling, hierarchical collection trees, library health diagnostics, and advanced cleanup (broken link/duplicate detection). Fully MCP-compliant with resources, tools, prompts, and sampling capabilities.

tools.name: diagnostics
tools.description: Server diagnostic information and library health metrics

tools.name: collection_list
tools.description: List all collections as a flat list

tools.name: get_collection_tree
tools.description: Hierarchical view of collections with full breadcrumb paths

tools.name: bookmark_search
tools.description: Advanced search with filters, tags, and pagination

tools.name: bookmark_manage
tools.description: Create, update, or delete individual bookmarks

tools.name: get_raindrop
tools.description: Fetch a single bookmark by ID

tools.name: list_raindrops
tools.description: List bookmarks for a collection with pagination

tools.name: get_suggestions
tools.description: AI-powered organization advice for a URL or bookmark

tools.name: bulk_edit_raindrops
tools.description: Bulk update, move, or remove bookmarks in a collection

tools.name: library_audit
tools.description: Scan library for broken links, duplicates, and untagged items

tools.name: remove_duplicates
tools.description: Optimized duplicate deletion pattern (scans all collections)

tools.name: suggest_tags
tools.description: Suggest relevant tags based on metadata using AI sampling

prompts.name: organize_by_topic
prompts.description: Analyze bookmarks and suggest collections and tags for organization
prompts.text: You are a bookmarking assistant that organizes Raindrop.io items by topic and intent. Given a list of bookmarks, propose a target collection and 3-6 tags per item. Propose concise collection moves and tag sets.

prompts.name: find_duplicates
prompts.description: Identify potential duplicate bookmarks using URL and title similarity
prompts.text: You detect duplicate bookmarks. Consider URL normalization, title similarity, and canonical forms. Return suspected duplicate pairs from the provided bookmark list.

prompts.name: export_markdown
prompts.description: Render bookmarks as Markdown list with title, link, tags, and excerpt
prompts.text: Format bookmarks as markdown bullet list using this pattern: [Title](URL) — excerpt — tags: tag1, tag2.

api_key.title: Raindrop Access Token
api_key.description: Your Raindrop.io API token. Visit https://app.raindrop.io/settings/integrations to generate one.
